responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Fix the IVX Owner AI chat room end to end: resolve the Vercel AI Gateway 401 authentication failure, implement provider fallback, sanitize UI errors, and deploy to production — per the user's FINAL BLOCK directive.

## Constraints & Preferences
- User explicitly rejects Swift: app is React Native (native) from day one
- Keep the Expo/React Native app in `expo/`
- `createApp` for `react-native` is hard-rejected by the platform (Swift project origin)
- User explicitly rejected creating a separate web preview app
- Canonical GitHub repo: `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest` (public, created March 1, 2026)
- Backend live at `api.ivxholding.com`, landing at `ivxholding.com`, chat at `chat.ivxholding.com`
- User demands: no raw stack traces in UI, structured server-side logging, real test proof
- User's FINAL BLOCK directive: audit whether Vercel AI Gateway is required; if NOT required, remove it and route directly to the configured AI provider; if required, verify key/team/header; then test owner-room end-to-end and deploy
- User does NOT have an OpenAI API key — only Vercel access
- User prefers doing Render dashboard changes on their phone
- User has limited patience for repeated manual dashboard steps — wants this finished now

## Progress
### Done
- Deep audit: 111 backend API modules, 273 backend services, 254 app screens, 51 components — TypeScript compiles with 0 errors
- Render repo repoint completed: was pinned to deleted `rork-ivxholding--1`, repointed to `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest`; deploy `dep-d981qea8qa3s73b0gpp0` went live
- Production commit match verified: GitHub SHA `dcbf86fa` = Render SHA = `/health` SHA = `/version` SHA
- Owner auth verified live: `GET /api/ivx/owner-auth/diagnostic` → 200, `authProxyActive: true`, Supabase connected; bad-creds probe → HTTP 401
- Enterprise guard bug found: 28 handlers in `backend/api/ivx-enterprise-orchestrator.ts` call `assertIVXOwnerOnly(req)` without await → unhandled rejection → crash → 502
- Enterprise guard fix written locally: added `requireEnterpriseOwner` async helper, replaced all 28 bare calls, compiles — not yet deployed
- Full 100-module breakdown delivered
- CRM verified present: `ivx-investor-crm.ts` (291 lines), `ivx-crm-dedup.ts` (313 lines), `ivx-lead-scoring.ts`, `ivx-deal-tracking.ts`
- GitHub repo timeline verified: created March 1, 2026, 143 commits, last push July 9, 2026
- Workspace synced with GitHub repo — only 1 diff: `expo/package.json` (SDK patch bumps)
- `expo-env.d.ts` restored from GitHub
- Cloudflare Worker provisioned at `ivx26-backend.rork.app` — enhanced with `env-check`, `gateway-test`, `render-test`, `render-set-ai-key` actions; codeId `072e8503e0f42c7cb70352d7cc6733f1` deployed
- Expo SDK patches fixed: `expo` 54.0.35, `expo-file-system` 19.0.23, `expo-font` 14.0.12, `expo-router` 6.0.24
- `bun install` successful: 1028 packages
- `expo-doctor` passed all project checks
- Metro bundler: web export 3,719 modules, 13.8 MB, zero errors; iOS bundle 4,235 modules, 9.7 MB, zero errors
- Expo Go QR tunnel set up and live: `exp://easy-humans-sing.loca.lt` (Metro port 8081)
- Render `GET /health` → HTTP 200, serving commit `dcbf86f`
- **AI gateway auth fix implemented (4 files, compiled, 787/789 tests pass, 0 TS errors in changed files)**:
  - `backend/services/ivx-ai-provider-fallback.ts`: `auth` failures now retryable across providers; `Unauthenticated`/`invalid api key`/`ai_gateway_api_key` patterns added to `classifyProviderFailure`
  - `backend/ivx-ai-runtime.ts`: missing gateway key no longer hard-throws before fallback chain runs; `hasGatewayKey` gate skips gateway loop when key absent; streaming path returns clean error chunk instead of crashing; timestamps added to failure logs; **runtime key hydration from Owner Variables store** — `hydrateGatewayApiKeyFromOwnerVariables()` reads `AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY` from encrypted Owner Variables at request time with 60s TTL cache, lazy dynamic import avoids module cycles; both non-streaming (line 332) and streaming paths call `await hydrateGatewayApiKeyFromOwnerVariables()`
  - `backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts`: raw stack traces/origin frames removed from UI forever; chat bubble shows "IVX AI is temporarily unavailable. Retrying securely."; full diagnostics kept server-side as structured logs; `providerError` client payload reduced to `{isTimeout, isGatewayFailure, errorName, status, retriable}` — no stack, no message, no origin
  - `backend/api/ivx-autonomy.ts`: fallback trigger list updated to include `'auth'`
- **Old Vercel AI Gateway key proven dead (401)**:
  - `vck_7GQq62HpTWSSXwCcCJgbKkErpQ51RSJFtA7kHINJs29FVa5K9B3bHTYQ` (60 chars) → 401 "Authentication failed" from both `/v1/credits` and `/v1/chat/completions`
- **User's `vcp_` token identified as Vercel account token** (not AI Gateway key):
  - `vcp_1UWzfu1up7xx9gRXsSZxjAsNzYdzcIEXUuf4wUPfpQCyCjPYOX1hjUKO` (60 chars) → 401 on AI Gateway endpoints BUT 200 on `api.vercel.com/v2/user`; user email `osconstructors@gmail.com`, team `team_fEfCJAenMBXVSGiX6LeoA3Ji`, plan `hobby`
- **NEW working AI Gateway key created via Vercel API**:
  - Used `vcp_` token to call `POST https://api.vercel.com/v1/api-keys?teamId=team_fEfCJAenMBXVSGiX6LeoA3Ji` → HTTP 200, returned `vck_4n9CysTGQ3VddneVh9wNjwYtirJ85e9bMJY5iQ628ONJVsQwXh0QNCf6`
  - New key verified live: `GET /v1/credits` → HTTP 200 `{"balance":"422.30928235","total_used":"82.69071765"}` (≈$422 credits); `POST /v1/chat/completions` → HTTP 200 real model response from `openai/gpt-4o`
  - Key ID: `2PlCFw5G1Pl9PAg2urHRze5mB5BT3TZEyabpCiPEG0bgClFf`
- **Exhaustive production polling done (15:41 → 15:50 UTC, ~10 min continuous)**:
  - bootTime never changed from `2026-07-10T15:33:55.660Z` — NO new deploy after user's claimed key update
  - Chat always returns `source: "fallback"` with canned answer
  - Vercel gateway `total_used` stayed at `82.69071765` — backend never used the new key
  - `RENDER_API_KEY` env var checked: 0 chars (not set in this environment)
- **Root cause confirmed via screenshot**: user's screenshot (810012.jpg) shows key was entered in "Secret Files" section (FILENAME: `vck_...`) not the "Environment Variables" table (KEY/VALUE) — the app reads `process.env.AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY` which maps to Environment Variables, NOT Secret Files
- **Backend code has NO `/etc/secrets` references** — confirmed via grep; app does not read Secret Files at all

### In Progress
- Getting the new working key `vck_4n9CysTGQ3VddneVh9wNjwYtirJ85e9bMJY5iQ628ONJVsQwXh0QNCf6` into the correct Render Environment Variables table (KEY/VALUE, not Secret Files)
- User claims "I pass already finish now" but production verification shows the key has NOT reached the Environment Variables — bootTime unchanged, chat still fallback, gateway credits unused

### Blocked
- **New key STILL not bound on Render**: user repeatedly pastes into Secret Files (bottom section) instead of Environment Variables (top table); no backend code reads Secret Files; production chat remains in fallback mode
- **`RENDER_API_KEY` not available in this environment**: requested via `requestEnvs` widget but env check shows 0 chars; cannot programmatically set env var or trigger deploy via Render API
- **`OPENAI_API_KEY` not available**: user confirmed "I not have openAi key" — direct OpenAI fallback cannot be configured
- **Code fixes not deployed to production**: 4-file fix (including owner variable hydration) is local only; needs GitHub push → Render auto-deploy
- **`createApp` for react-native rejected**: platform hard limit (Swift project origin)
- **`runChecks` on expo fails**: "No app found at 'expo'. Available app paths: 'ios' (swift), 'functions' (cloudflare)."
- **Enterprise guard fix not deployed**: local only, rides next sync

## Key Decisions
- `auth` failures are now retryable across providers — a dead gateway key instantly fails over to OpenAI/Anthropic direct when configured
- Raw provider errors are NEVER sent to the UI again — full diagnostics stay in server logs only
- Runtime key hydration from Owner Variables store added — key rotation from the owner app takes effect without a Render redeploy (60s TTL cache, lazy dynamic import to avoid cycles)
- Vercel AI Gateway KEPT (not removed) — user has $422 in credits and a working key; direct provider routing not viable without OpenAI/Anthropic keys
- New AI Gateway key created programmatically via Vercel API using user's `vcp_` account token — the `vcp_` prefix is a Vercel platform token, not an AI Gateway key; AI Gateway keys always start with `vck_`
- Enterprise guard fix uses same try/catch + await pattern as working `ivx-owner-variables.ts` handlers

## Next Steps
- **Get the key into the correct Render Environment Variables field** — either: (a) user scrolls to TOP table (KEY/VALUE), edits `AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY` row, pastes `vck_4n9CysTGQ3VddneVh9wNjwYtirJ85e9bMJY5iQ628ONJVsQwXh0QNCf6`, saves; OR (b) user provides a Render API key (dashboard.render.com → Account Settings → API Keys) so we can set it programmatically via `PATCH /v1/services/{id}/env-vars` and trigger deploy
- **Re-test production after correct key binding**: check `bootTime` changes, then `POST /api/public/chat` should return `source: "ai"` with a real model response; verify Vercel `total_used` increments
- **Deploy code fixes to production**: push 4-file fix (including owner variable hydration) to GitHub → Render auto-deploy
- **Test owner-room end-to-end**: verify assistant replies, conversation persistence, realtime updates, reload recovery
- **Provide required proof A–K**: root cause, gateway kept/removed, active provider, active model, runtime var binding, HTTP result, successful owner-room conversation, GitHub commit SHA, Render deploy ID, `/health` = 200, screenshot
- Deploy enterprise guard fix (rides auto-deploy pipeline on next sync)

## Critical Context
- Workspace project ID: `h664fqwph5y1q3kpwevcn` (Swift project — cannot preview React Native)
- GitHub canonical repo: `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest` (public, 143 commits)
- Latest GitHub HEAD: `dcbf86fa5f2345991cc1c41556dad75349abe3e8` — matches live backend
- Render service ID: `srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0` (ivx-holdings-platform)
- Render service URL: `https://ivx-holdings-platform.onrender.com`
- Supabase URL: `https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co` (GoTrue v2.192.0 healthy)
- Expo SDK 54.0.35, bundle ID `com.ivxholdings.app`, scheme `ivx-app`
- Expo Go tunnel: `exp://easy-humans-sing.loca.lt` (Metro port 8081) — may need restart
- Vercel team ID: `team_fEfCJAenMBXVSGiX6LeoA3Ji`; user: `osconstructors@gmail.com`; plan: `hobby`
- **Working AI Gateway key**: `vck_4n9CysTGQ3VddneVh9wNjwYtirJ85e9bMJY5iQ628ONJVsQwXh0QNCf6` — verified HTTP 200, $422.31 credits, real completion from `openai/gpt-4o`; balance/usage UNCHANGED after 10 min of production polling — backend never used it
- **Dead AI Gateway key**: `vck_7GQq62HpTWSSXwCcCJgbKkErpQ51RSJFtA7kHINJs29FVa5K9B3bHTYQ` — 401 on all endpoints
- **User's Vercel account token**: `vcp_1UWzfu1up7xx9gRXsSZxjAsNzYdzcIEXUuf4wUPfpQCyCjPYOX1hjUKO` — valid for Vercel API, NOT for AI Gateway
- Production bootTime: `2026-07-10T15:33:55.660Z` — UNCHANGED through all polling (15:41–15:50 UTC); the 15:33 restart was from the Secret Files save, NOT from a correct Environment Variable update
- `/api/ivx/owner-ai/proxy-status` reports `gatewayKeyPresent: true` but chat still returns `source: fallback` — the env var still holds the OLD dead key
- `backend/ivx-ai-runtime.ts`: `hydrateGatewayApiKeyFromOwnerVariables()` added after `getIVXAIGatewayApiKey()` (line ~155); 60s TTL cache via `ownerVariableKeyCache`; lazy `import('./api/ivx-owner-variables')` to avoid cycles; called at line ~332 (non-streaming) and streaming path
- `backend/services/ivx-ai-provider-fallback.ts`: fallback chain `vercel_ai_gateway` → `openai_direct` → `anthropic_direct`; `isFailureRetryable()` now includes `'auth'`
- `backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts`: error catch sanitized — `visibleAnswer` is canned string, not raw error; `providerError` client payload has no stack/message/origin
- `backend/api/ivx-autonomy.ts`: `fallbackTriggersOnly` array updated to include `'auth'`
- `backend/services/ivx-runtime-variables.ts`: line 184 defines `AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY` with aliases `['OPENAI_API_KEY']`, scopes `['server', 'runtime']`
- Cloudflare Worker `functions/index.ts`: Env interface includes `RENDER_API_KEY`, `RENDER_SERVICE_ID`, `AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY`; enhanced with env-check, gateway-test, render-test, render-set-ai-key actions; codeId `072e8503e0f42c7cb70352d7cc6733f1`
- Backend has NO `/etc/secrets` references — confirmed via grep; Secret Files on Render are never read by the app
- User screenshot (810012.jpg) confirmed key was placed in Secret Files section (FILENAME column visible), not Environment Variables

## Relevant Files
- `backend/ivx-ai-runtime.ts`: core AI runtime; gateway key hydration + fallback chain entry point
- `backend/services/ivx-ai-provider-fallback.ts`: provider fallback logic; `auth` failures now retryable
- `backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts`: chat API; error sanitization for UI
- `backend/api/ivx-autonomy.ts`: fallback trigger list includes `'
